description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a fenced yard with a mix of grass, trees, and a small pool. The building features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a prominent balcony with glass railings overlooking the garden. The front facade includes a shaded patio area with a wooden pergola and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private backyard with a pool, palm tree, and outdoor seating area. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored brick, and the property is bordered by a low, modern fence. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and clean, geometric lines.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, balcony, and a fenced yard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior is light brick with landscaped greenery and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facade with a balcony, large windows, and a shaded patio area, as well as the fenced yard and tree.
description_view_1: This side view shows the pool, palm tree, and outdoor seating area in the backyard, along with grouped windows and the fence.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain back wall, a large window, and the wooden pergola over the patio, with the tree and fence visible.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the entrance area, the pergola, and the tree, with a clear view of the fenced yard and some interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and balcony-facing windows
